footer.brandBlurb: Guided enduro routes from Álora, Málaga. Multi-day packages with bike and accommodation included.

home.title: Ride the wild heart of Andalucía
home.subtitle: Multi-day guided enduro routes through Málaga's most varied terrain — bike, accommodation and local knowledge included.

packages.title: Two ways to ride
packages.note: Adventure bike options available on route days. We also advise you personally and prepare an individual offer for you.

findUs.title: Based in Álora, Málaga
findUs.text: 20 minutes from Málaga airport, at the edge of some of the province's best enduro terrain.

about.title: Local knowledge, real trails
about.intro: EnduroFun is a small team of riders and guides based in Álora, running multi-day enduro routes across the wildest parts of the province of Málaga.

story.title: Riders first, guides by trade
story.text: What started as a handful of friends exploring the trails around Álora on weekends grew into a small guided-tour operation, built on years of riding the same terrain in every season and condition. Every route we run has been ridden by us first — we know where the mud sits after rain, which climbs need a run-up, and where to stop for the best views.

localKnowledge.title: Local knowledge
localKnowledge.text: Routes built from years riding this exact terrain, not GPS tracks pulled off the internet.

variedTerrain.title: Varied terrain
variedTerrain.text: Dusty singletrack, rocky climbs and open fire roads, all within a short ride of Álora.

culturalOffering.title: Cultural offering
culturalOffering.text: Rest-day options like Caminito del Rey or Málaga's old town — more than just a bike trip.

beginner.label: Beginner
beginner.text: Comfortable on a bike, new to off-road — routes chosen with easier sections and more guidance.

intermediate.label: Intermediate
intermediate.text: Some enduro/off-road experience — the standard route mix on most packages.

advanced.label: Advanced
advanced.text: Confident on technical terrain — routes can be adjusted for more demanding sections on request.
